---
title: "08 Centroids"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
```

```{r}
source_gpkg <- "/Volumes/DEBIAS/data/inputs/geographies/boundaries/MSOA_Dec_2021_EW_BFC_V7.gpkg"
output_file <- "/Volumes/DEBIAS/data/inputs/geographies/centroids/msoa_centroids.rds"

msoa_source <- st_read(
  source_gpkg,
  query = "
    SELECT
      MSOA21CD,
      MSOA21NM,
      BNG_E,
      BNG_N,
      LONG,
      LAT
    FROM MSOA_2021_EW_BFC_V7
  ",
  quiet = TRUE
)

msoa_centroids <- msoa_source |>
  transmute(
    area = MSOA21CD,
    name = MSOA21NM,
    easting = as.numeric(BNG_E),
    northing = as.numeric(BNG_N),
    longitude = as.numeric(LONG),
    latitude = as.numeric(LAT)
  )

saveRDS(msoa_centroids, output_file)
```
